name: oh-my-wiki
description: General-purpose wiki runtime with local search, capture, hooks, skills, and optional OMX/OMC wrappers.

scripts.check: find src -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check && npm test
scripts.check:git-policy: node scripts/git-policy.mjs subject "feat: validate git policy" && node scripts/git-policy.mjs branch "fix/example-branch"
